title: Setup, Theming, and Static Data Layer
summary: Configure Tailwind CSS dark theme, define typography, and create the static data definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind dark mode is active by default. Global CSS and custom fonts are applied. `lib/data.ts` contains typed placeholder data for all sections (artists, services, faqs, testimonials, etc.).

title: Core Layout and Navigation
summary: Implement the responsive Navbar with smooth-scrolling anchor links and the site Footer.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar is sticky, responsive (mobile menu), and contains links that smoothly scroll to section IDs. Footer displays required links, social icons, and copyright.

title: Informational Sections
summary: Build the Hero, Services, and Studio Information sections including FAQs.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero displays optimized background and CTA. Services list offerings and starting prices. Studio Info shows address, hours, and an accordion-based FAQ.

title: Media Sections (Artists, Portfolio, Testimonials)
summary: Implement the Artists bio grid, Portfolio gallery with image modals, and Testimonials component.
acceptanceCriteria: Artists are displayed in a responsive grid. Portfolio uses Next.js Image for optimization and opens larger images in a dialog/modal. Testimonials are visually distinct and readable on all screen sizes.

title: Contact & Booking Form
summary: Build the booking inquiry form and wire it to a Next.js Server Action.
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes required fields (Name, Email, Phone, Artist, Description, Dates). Validates input on client. Server action receives payload, logs it, and returns success. UI shows success message upon submission.

title: Assembly, SEO, and Polish
summary: Compose the page, add SEO metadata, and optimize for Lighthouse targets.
acceptanceCriteria: All components are integrated into `app/page.tsx`. `app/layout.tsx` includes proper SEO and Open Graph metadata. Application passes responsive checks and scores 90+ on Lighthouse (Performance, Accessibility, SEO).
